title: RedHitIndicator
description: Shows a red "Hit!" indicator below your crosshair when aiming at mobs or players. Instant visual feedback for better aim accuracy in PvP and combat.
body: A simple mod that shows red "Hit!" text when your crosshair is on a mob or player's hitbox. Instant feedback for better PvP aim and combat practice.It can be toggled with "J" key.
